kingdom.quote: "It's true that things are beautiful when they work. Art is function". -- Giannina Braschi
kingdom.long_description: Skeptical about magic and physical exercise, members of the League may not be used to harsh conditions. Nevertheless, citizens of the Serene Republic are keen to spread art and science to new lands.
kingdom.post_selection_description: , a refined society of scholars and artists.

trees.stump_description: Not a tree anymore... Won't regrow, harvest it to clear the space.

sapling.description_iconic: Plant it in the earth and watch it grow.

seed.description: Plant it to grow a vertical beauty.
seed.crop_description: Even a majestic cypress has humble beginnings.

sprout.description: Just needs some time and care.

bud.description: It's almost there!  It's growing its adult leaves!

sapling.description_iconic: Plant it in the earth and watch it grow.

seed.description: Plant it to grow impressive umbrella pine.
seed.crop_description: Even an impressive pine has humble beginnings.

sprout.description: Just needs some time and care.

bud.description: It's almost there!  It's growing its adult leaves!

small.description: On its way to become a sturdy tree.

sapling.description_iconic: Plant it in the earth and watch it grow.

seed.description: Plant it to grow an olive tree. It takes time.
seed.crop_description: Even an impressive olive tree has humble beginnings.

transmute_recipe.description: Select the best fruits from the basket
transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can choose the best fruits, but the rest are destroyed in the process.

sprout.description: Just needs some time and care.

bud.description: It's almost there!  It's growing its adult leaves!

small.description: This tree will bear some olives in summer and autumn.

medium.description: This tree will bear olives in summer and autumn.

large.description: This tree will bear many olives in summer and autumn.

sapling.description_iconic: Plant it in the earth and watch it grow.

seed.description: Plant it to grow an lemon tree. It takes time.
seed.crop_description: Even an impressive lemon tree has humble beginnings.

transmute_recipe.description: Select the best fruits from the basket
transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can choose the best fruits, but the rest are destroyed in the process.

sprout.description: Just needs some time and care.

bud.description: It's almost there!  It's growing its adult leaves!

small.description: This tree will bear some lemons in spring and summer.

medium.description: This tree will bear lemons in spring and summer.

large.description: This tree will bear many lemons in spring and summer.

celery_crop.description: Both shoots and roots are edible!
celery_crop.description_ace: Fair growth time; Provides hearty vegetables and often leafy greens.

celery_seeds.description: Learn to grow celeriac for shoots and roots.

recipe.description: Domesticate Celeriacs and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate celeriac!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

grapes_crop.description: Slow-growing vine with the best fruit for wine.
grapes_crop.description_ace: Long growth time; Very efficiently provides fruits

002.name: Mature Grapevine
002.description: Ready to blossom and bear fruit.

grape_seeds.description: Learn to grow grapes so you can make wine.

recipe.description: Domesticate Grape Vines and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate grape vines!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

lavender_crop.description: Aromatic flower herb from warmer climates.
lavender_crop.description_ace: Decorative only! Cultivate them in Herbalist Planters for soothing herbs.

lavender_seeds.description: Learn to grow lavender, a herbal blossom.

recipe.description: Domesticate Lavender plants and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate lavender!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

purslane_crop.description: Sour flower herb from warmer climates.
purslane_crop.description_ace: Decorative only! Cultivate them in Herbalist Planters for healing or pungent herbs.

purslane_seeds.description: Learn to grow purslane, durable sour herb.

recipe.description: Domesticate Purslane plants and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate purslane!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

sugar_cane_crop.description: Most effective sugar source in the world!
sugar_cane_crop.description_ace: Fair growth time; Efficiently provides stalks which can be refined into sugar.

sugar_cane_seeds.description: Learn to grow Sugarcane, most effective sugar source in the world!

recipe.description: Domesticate Sugarcane plants and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate sugar cane!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

cypress_crop.description: Can be grown and harvested for wood logs, evergreen boughs and a seed when cut

stonehearth_ace.description: Fair growth time; Provides wood logs, evergreen boughs and a cypress cone

recipe.description: Domesticate Cypress trees and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate cypress trees!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

stone_pine_crop.description: Can be grown and harvested for wood logs, evergreen boughs and a seed when cut

stonehearth_ace.description: Long growth time; Provides wood logs, evergreen boughs and a pine cone

recipe.description: Domesticate Stone Pines and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate stone pines!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

olive_crop.description: Can be grown for olives and harvested for wood logs, boughs and a seed when cut

stonehearth_ace.description: Long growth time; Provides olives (savoury vegetable and oily grain) or wood logs and boughs if cut

recipe.description: Domesticate Olive Trees and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate olive trees!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

lemon_crop.description: Can be grown for lemons and harvested for wood logs, boughs and a seed when cut

stonehearth_ace.description: Fair growth time; Provides fine fruits or wood logs if cut

recipe.description: Domesticate Lemon Trees and learn how to farm them.
recipe.flavor: Interact with the finished crate to unlock the crop. This will also consume this item
recipe.description_2: Trade or gift it to allow other cultures to cultivate lemon trees!
recipe.flavor_2: This farming crop is already known to your farmers by default

lavender.description: Impressively blossoming plant useful as a soothing herb.

seed.description: Plant it in the earth to grow the herb.

sprout.description: Look, it's there, in the soil!

bud.description: Come on buddy, it's very close to finish!

herb.description: Mesmerising... Useful as a soothing herb.

transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can harvest the fragile seeds, but the herbs are lost in the process.

purslane.description: Durable plant which can be used as a healing but pungent herb.

seed.description: Plant it in the earth to grow the herb.

sprout.description: Look, it's there, in the soil!

bud.description: Come on buddy, it's very close to finish!

herb.description: Cute but acrid. Useful as a healing or pungent herb.

transmute_recipe.description: Separate seeds from the herbs. Purslane is known for its incredibly sour taste, use with caution!
transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can harvest the fragile seeds, but the herbs are lost in the process.

dandelions.description: Expansive plants with yellow flowers useful as mild herbs.

seed.description: Plant it in the earth to grow dandelions.

sprout.description: Taking first steps on its way for power.

bud.description: Will soon join the ranks of Dandelion Empire!

herb.description: Smells of honey. Useful as a mild herb.

transmute_recipe.description: Separate seeds from the herbal flowers. Dandelions will spread after planting.
transmute_recipe.flavor: Villains in the eyes of every gardener, the Dandelion Empire keeps expanding its borders.

basket.description: An aromatic and very nutritious veggie. Useful as a hearty vegetable.

greens_basket.description: Nutritious and crunchy celery stalks. Useful as leafy greens.

basket.description: Sweet, velvety small fruits. Can be eaten raw or used in cooking and brewing.
Ready to be processed into oil, eaten or used in cooking as a savory vegetable.
Sour citrus fruits. Can be eaten raw (ouch!) or used in cooking and brewing.

sugar_cane.description: Can be processed to make sugar.

seed.description: Plant it in the earth to grow the cane.

sprout.description: Look, it's there, in the soil!

bud.description: Come on buddy, it's very close to finish!

basket.description: Can be processed to make sugar.

bale.description: Can be processed to make sugar.

transmute_recipe.flavor: Only a skilled hand can harvest the fragile seeds, but sugarcane is lost in the process.

plaster.description: Easier to form than stone, can also replace clay while crafting.
plaster.flavor: Unmatched for setting, unless you add water too early.

plastered_stone_bricks.description: Building material as sturdy as stone yet of more cosy appearance.

plastered_door.description: Lighter than doors made of stone.

plastered_double_door.description: Much lighter than doors made of stone.

plastered_tunnel_door.description: Seals off your tunnels with style.

plastered_window_frame_small.description: Plastered window frames will let critters or projectiles through.
plastered_window_frame_small.flavor: As simple as it could be: squares everywhere!

plastered_window_frame_tall.description: Plastered window frames will let critters or projectiles through.
plastered_window_frame_tall.flavor: Elegance at its very basics. It's just a rectangle.

plastered_window_frame_wide.description: Plastered window frames will let critters or projectiles through.

plastered_window_small.description: Unlike plastered window frames, plastered windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

plastered_window_small_shuttered.description: Unlike plastered window frames, plastered windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

plastered_window_tall.description: Unlike plastered window frames, plastered windows do not let critters or projectiles through.

plastered_window_tall_shuttered.description: Unlike plastered window frames, plastered windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
plastered_window_tall_shuttered.flavor: Has a little note in the corner: "Made in Italy."

plastered_window_wide.description: Unlike plastered window frames, plastered windows do not let critters or projectiles through.
plastered_window_wide.flavor: We could add the shutters but they would have doubled the width.

plaster_fence.description: Higher class replacement of a fence.

plaster_fence_post.description: Put in corners of a balustrade.
plaster_fence_post.flavor: I am not sure how stable that topping ball is. Is it heavy?

simple_hatch_plastered.description: An elegant hatch for vertical doorways.

plastered_animal_door.description: A large door for animal shelters, it can be closed by a shepherd. When closed, only hearthlings may go through!

plastered_animal_door_small.description: A small door for animal shelters, it can be closed by a shepherd.
plastered_animal_door_small.flavor: When placed on ground level, the two tiles of dirt underneath it must be dug out for it to work!

input_bin_plaster.description: A versatile container for any resource, to help keep crafters supplied.
input_bin_plaster.flavor: Input containers are prioritized when new resources are brought to town.

input_shelf_ground_plaster.description: A versatile container for any resource, to help keep crafters supplied.
input_shelf_ground_plaster.flavor: Input containers are prioritized when new resources are brought to town.

input_shelf_wall_plaster.description: A versatile container for any resource, to help keep crafters supplied.
input_shelf_wall_plaster.flavor: Input containers are prioritized when new resources are brought to town.

plaster_urn_small.description: For compactly storing up to 8 items.

plaster_urn_large.description: For compactly storing up to 32 items.
plaster_urn_large.flavor: So, you say it is possible to take things out of it?

output_box_plaster.flavor: Crafters love to show off their work!

hanging_box_lavender.description: A planter box full of lavender, attached to walls.
hanging_box_lavender.flavor: Lavender keeps scorpions at a distance.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Lavender but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed against walls. Comes with Lavender but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

hanging_box_purslane.description: A planter box full of purslane, attached to walls.
hanging_box_purslane.flavor: Purslane can grow in a somewhat unpredicted and cute way.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Purslane but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed against walls. Comes with Purslane but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

hanging_box_vines.description: A planter box full of vines, attached to walls.
hanging_box_vines.flavor: It's the dwarf variety so you don't wake up entangled with the stems.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. The vines have taken over so you cannot change the herb.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed against walls. The vines are so invasive you cannot change the herb like with other planters!

plaster_box_lavender.description: A planter box full of lavender, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_lavender.flavor: Lavender keeps scorpions at a distance.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Lavender but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Lavender but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

plaster_box_purslane.description: A planter box full of purslane, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_purslane.flavor: Purslane can grow in a somewhat unpredicted and cute way.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Purslane but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Purslane but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

plaster_box_vines.description: A planter box full of vines, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_vines.flavor: It's the dwarf variety so you don't wake up entangled with the stems.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. The vines have taken over so you cannot change the herb.

recipe.description: A decorative planter to be placed under window frames. The vines are so invasive you cannot change the herb like with other planters!

plaster_box_long_lavender.description: A planter box full of lavender, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_long_lavender.flavor: Lavender keeps scorpions at a distance.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Lavender but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A long planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Lavender but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

plaster_box_long_purslane.description: A planter box full of purslane, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_long_purslane.flavor: Purslane can grow in a somewhat unpredicted and cute way.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. Includes Purslane but another herb can be chosen.

recipe.description: A long planter to be placed under window frames. Comes with Purslane but a different herb can be chosen and planted by the Herbalist.

plaster_box_long_vines.description: A planter box full of vines, built to be placed below window frames.
plaster_box_long_vines.flavor: It's the dwarf variety so you don't wake up entangled with the stems.

stonehearth_ace.description: A decorative planter. The vines have taken over so you cannot change the herb.

recipe.description: A long planter to be placed under window frames. The vines are so invasive you cannot change the herb like with other planters!

plastered_market_stall.description: Merchants can visit this stall to buy and sell goods
plastered_market_stall.flavor: Gelato! We sell the best gelato in town!

rooftile_edge.description: Decorate roofs, can be placed on walls.
rooftile_edge.flavor: Design uses Ochre colour from Plastered Stone Bricks palette.

rooftile_corner_inner.description: Decorate roofs, can be placed on walls.
rooftile_corner_inner.flavor: Design uses Ochre colour from Plastered Stone Bricks palette.

rooftile_corner_outer.description: Decorate roofs, can be placed on walls.
rooftile_corner_outer.flavor: Design uses Ochre colour from Plastered Stone Bricks palette.

plaster_crude_bed.description: You might not want to jump into this one.
plaster_crude_bed.flavor: Elegant frame might distract you from the discomfort of sleeping on hard surface.

plaster_bed.description: A bed to call your own after a hard day's work.
plaster_bed.flavor: Thatch can be obtained by harvesting grass tufts, some plants like Wintermoss or digging into grassy terrain.

plaster_comfy_bed.description: Eight hours will leave you as refreshed as the day you were born.
plaster_comfy_bed.flavor: Nobody ever wants to get out. It makes emergency evacuations awkward.

plaster_comfy_bed_herbalist.description: A comfortable bed with a support table to provide the best treatments.

plaster_comfy_bed_pet.description: Allows animals to have a more comfortable sleep.
plaster_comfy_bed_pet.flavor: Pets will always try to sleep on the bed that is closest to their owner's bed!

plaster_bench.description: Outdoor seating for moments of relaxation.
plaster_bench.flavor: Pretty and functional. Matches the wigs.

plaster_table.description: Its considerable weight gives it a sense of gravitas.

plaster_table_covered.description: Gingham clothing suggests it isn't as heavy as it is.

simple_plaster_chair.flavor: More civilised than sitting on the floor.

comfy_plaster_chair.description: A very nice somewhere to sit while eating.
comfy_plaster_chair.flavor: Not a throne but will do.

juice_grape.description: Refreshing and flavorful beverage made with grapes.
juice_grape.flavor: Lack of skins makes it unsuitable for wine production.

juice_lemon.description: Almost unbearably sour beverage made with lemons.

lemonade.description: Sugar does not make it less acidic but at least mitigates the sour taste.

must_red_grape.description: Crushed red grapes, juice and solids. A Brewer needs it to fill a wine cask!

red_wine.description: Most classy of all the brews. Makes hearthlings happy but also a little tipsy!

serving_pitcher_iconic.description: Place it somewhere so hearthlings can serve themselves!

hippocras_serving.description: Spicy, warming and not very strong!

serving_keg_iconic.description: Place it somewhere so hearthlings can serve themselves!

serving_keg.description: A Serene League speciality! Spicy, warming and with little alcohol content.

limoncello.description: Very refined, a truly luxurious drink that will make hearthlings a bit tipsy.

serving_keg_iconic.description: Place it somewhere so hearthlings can serve themselves!

cloth_padded_uniform.description: Provides light protection in a fight. Every little bit helps!

bronze_uniform.description: Covered with metal parts for extra protection.

iron_uniform.description: A full suit of iron armor

steel_hat.description: Strong and not so heavy protection for your head.

steel_uniform.description: A very fancy and strong chainmail suit of armor.

ornate_cleric_armor.description: A more inspiring outfit for the Cleric.

recipe.description: Craft a more inspiring outfit for the Cleric. It also provides some bonuses.
recipe.flavor: In an embroidered gown like this one can deliver a lecture to any audience!

mozzarella.description: Soft, moist and delicious! This cheese will go bad after some time if not eaten.

sunstroke_crafter_outfit.description: Can only be worn by crafters. Protects from hot weather and sunstrokes.

sunstroke_field_work_outfit.description: A hat for workers and field workers. Protects from hot weather and sunstrokes.

carpenter_saw_recipe.flavor: More fragile than an iron saw but equally viable in skilled hands.

plaster_water_well_recipe.description: Assemble the materials for upgrading a simple well into a nice, better looking plaster well.

gypsum_kiln.description: Used to burn stone into gypsum, base ingredient of plaster.
gypsum_kiln.flavor: Formable materials are easier to work with than hard stone.

level_2_data.perk_000_description: Exposure to fibrous plants has given the farmer ideas about spinning threads. See the promotion menu for details.

brewer_fermenting_carboy_red_wine.description: The red wine is ready and can now be racked into jugs!

brewer_fermenting_carboy_unfermented_red.description: The fruits are fermenting and releasing all their flavors! Not yet ready...

brewer_wine_cask_red_wine.description: The red wine is ready and can now be racked into jugs!

brewer_wine_cask_unfermented_red_wine.description: The fruits are fermenting and releasing all their flavors! Not yet ready...

must_red_grape_recipe.description: Crushed red grapes with skins and juice. Within a Wine Cask it can be turned into red wine!
must_red_grape_recipe.flavor: Wild yeast living on the skins are crucial for the fermentation process.

red_wine_serving_pitcher_recipe.description: Provides 14 goblets of red wine. It needs to be placed down before being used.
red_wine_serving_pitcher_recipe.flavor: Pitchers prevent waste, thus dispensing more servings

hippocras_serving_keg_recipe.description: Widely known remedy for winter sorrows: spicy, warming and with little alcohol content.
hippocras_serving_keg_recipe.flavor: Requires placement before it can be used

limoncello_recipe.description: Serene League recipe combining a sweet treat with the very finest of lemon zest flavours extracted with alcohol.
limoncello_recipe.flavor: Particularly good after a dinner at granny's.

limoncello_serving_keg_recipe.description: Provides 28 cups of the special Serene League brew. It needs to be placed down before being used.
limoncello_serving_keg_recipe.flavor: Tapped drinks prevent waste, thus dispensing more servings

liqueur_almond_recipe.description: A very refined recipe for a luxury beverage known as Amaretto to Serene League.
liqueur_almond_recipe.flavor: A classy choice for desserts due to its mesmerising aroma!

liqueur_almond_serving_keg_recipe.description: Provides 28 cups of almond liqueur also known as Amaretto. It needs to be placed down before being used.

lemonade_recipe.description: Sugar does not make it less acidic but at least mitigates the sour taste.
lemonade_recipe.flavor: A refreshing combination, perfect for hot weather!

cane_sugar.description: Obtaining sugar from sugarcane is slightly easier than from sugarbells.
cane_sugar.flavor: It takes more resources though as sugarcane leaves are not suitable for refinement.

mozzarella_recipe.description: Miraculously moist and tender cheese made by pasta filata method: stirring the curds in hot water then kneading them a bit.
mozzarella_recipe.flavor: Cottage Cheese can be obtained by early harvesting of Cheese Vats.

lavender.description: Gorgeous bushy herb from warmer climates. Needs a few days to be fully grown and will provide soothing herbs when harvested.

purslane.description: Durable, acidic succulent. Grows very quickly and will provide healing or pungent herbs when harvested.

basil.description: Warm climate plant with round leaves and unmistakable scent. Grows very quickly and will provide zesty herbs when harvested.

dandelions.description: An expansive plant. Needs a bunch of days to be fully grown and will provide mild herbs when harvested.

stone_pine_sapling.description: Tall umbrella evergreen tree found in the coast. Needs some days before it has grown enough to be replanted somewhere else.

cypress_sapling.description: Sleek and classy evergreen tree found in the coast. Needs some days before it has grown enough to be replanted somewhere else.

olive_sapling.description: An olive-bearing (savoury, oily veggie) tree that survives dry climates. Needs some days before it has grown enough to be replanted somewhere else.

lemon_sapling.description: A fruit-bearing tree that survives dry climates. Needs some days before it has grown enough to be replanted somewhere else.

coast.description: Rocks and mountains descending into the sea. Default home of the Serene League.

spring.description: Spring in the Coast is the mildest season, lasting two months. Occasional rainfall keeps the soil fresh while pleasant sunshine brings new life to all plants and creatures.

summer.description: Summer in the Coast is the hottest season, lasting five months. It is dry and not very windy with little rainfall, which usually comes together with violent storms.

autumn.description: Autumn in the Coast is the harvest season, lasting two months. Plants enjoy their portion of rain after the dry summer while the skies darken with rain clouds before drier, windy winter.

winter.description: Winter in the Coast is a windy season, lasting three months. It is also quite dry, making plants and animals exhausted by hot summer and stormy autumn wait for spring rainfall.

serene_mind.description:
Are all of our daily mishaps worth worrying about? We should focus on the big picture instead. Diligence and Curiosity are increased.
  • Crafting quality is quite increased
  • The hearthling's mood is quite increased

serene_mind.tooltip: Can anything bring a thought more refreshing than a goblet of wine?

windy_dry.description:
The air is dry as the winds howl across the lands.
  • Normal sunlight levels.
  • Noticeably reduced humidity levels.

windy_chilly_dry.description:
The air is dry and cold as the winds howl across the lands.
  • Normal sunlight levels.
  • Noticeably reduced humidity levels.
  • Unsheltered hearthlings are too chilly to work as effectively.

cloudy_hot.description:
Skies may be dark, but accumulated heat is still unbearable.
  • Fairly reduced sunlight levels.
  • Regular humidity levels.
  • Unsheltered hearthlings are too hot to work as effectively.
  • Unsheltered pasture animals are affected by the heat.

fermenting_carboy_fill_unfermented_red_w.description: Order the Brewer to fill this fermenting vessel with red grape juice! This Carboy will continue producing Red Wine until a new command is given.

wine_cask_fill_unfermented_red_wine.description: Order the Brewer to fill this fermenting vessel with red grape juice! This Cask will continue producing Red Wine until a new command is given.

build_well_roof_terracotta.description: Use a crafted Terracotta Water Well Roof to add a fancy roof to make your citizens happier and your water always fresh! The roof needs to be installed by a worker or the potter.

build_well_plaster.description: Order this simple well to be upgraded into a plaster water well. Doing so requires Plaster Water Well Parts, a refined item that can be crafted by the Mason.

amberstone.bonus_description: All citizens gain Amberstone Aura buff.

messages.000: I've heard a lot about your town!
messages.001: I'd like to join your town.
messages.002: You guys really look like you could use a hand!
messages.003: Wow! What a town! Let me help out!

bulletin_message.00:
Salve a tutti! My name’s Rinaldo Fabioni. I hope I am not interrupting anything important.

I come to you following the wish of His Serenity the Doge himself.

First and foremost, His Serenity wishes to express his happiness and gratitude. In the Capital we are all very glad to see such a talented team willing to spread the Enlightenment to new lands.

Serving the Republic is an honour and guarding centuries-old legacy is our duty, especially in unsteady times like these.

Rinaldo is trying to keep his uplifting smile but his eyes tell he is worried.

His Serenity is doing his best trying to protect the borders but the raids of the Red Kiln seem to get more and more powerful each day. Our army is looking, erm, I meant… doing splendid, nevertheless the Council was forced to hire mercenaries from the North to keep the Kiln away from the Capital.

meet_rinaldo_3.choice_000: I’m sure they’ll keep them away...

bulletin_message.00:
…far enough not to worry... for now. If the Capital wasn’t built on water troops of the Kiln could have gotten there already. Our fleet may be invincible but the Kiln is blockading almost all land routes. The last caravan from Rayya’s Children arrived few months ago. Empty-handed.

Rinaldo is not even trying to smile anymore.

Letting a merchant pass and letting the goods pass are two different things. Orcs know that well. If the trade collapses we will not be able to pay the mercenaries. Orcs know that too. And mercenaries don’t fight for free - that orcs know better than anyone else.

meet_rinaldo_5.choice_001: Can we help in any way?

bulletin_message.00:
Your enthusiasm seems to lighten the conversation up.

That brings us to the reason of my visit. The Council sent me here to officially grant your municipality a trade license. That requires your town to become a member of one of the trade guilds.

meet_rinaldo_6.choice_000: [skip] About time! Where do I sign?

bulletin_message.00:
The way Rinaldo looks at you changes; he seems wise beyond his years.

We don’t call ourselves a League without a reason. Most of us belong to at least one of the guilds. There are many types of guilds, specialising in different fields. Centuries ago the guilds were competing with each other. Conflicts arose and smaller guilds started associating into leagues to withstand the pressure of larger ones. Leagues started associating with each other into even bigger leagues until one day there were just two of them left.

rinaldo_story_1.choice_000: I don’t like where this is going...

bulletin_message.00: Oh silly, haven’t I told you one can be a member of more than one guild? Besides, would you like to participate in unnecessary physical exerc… violence, that’s what I wanted to say. Anyway, instead of dividing people and forcing them to decide which side they support, leaders of the guilds gathered together (we now call such an assembly the Council) and decided to form one league...

Exactly. Conflicts were ended once and for all and as all people were united into one League the Council declared all lands owned by the League members are united into one dominion, the Serene Republic, and decided to elect a ruler, the Serene Doge, from one of its members.

rinaldo_story_3.choice_000: Fascinating, but what about our guild?

bulletin_message.00:
Rinaldo blushes.

Pardon me, right back to you trade license! To become a trader officially recognised by the Republic you must be a member of one of the trade guilds. I must say, you seem to be famous as I have letters from leaders of the most prominent three in the whole League with me! One does not read someone else’s correspondence so I have no idea what exactly they wrote but I bet they all have great offers for you!

Rinaldo hands you three differently sealed scrolls.

Man, you have reasons to celebrate and you know how to do that! I wish I didn’t have to leave this early but His Serenity has entrusted me with more orders of utmost importance. Here, take this as my contribution to the party:

Oh, before I go: I heard a respected member of the Academy is on his way to the neighbourhood to oversee some important excavation works, as you’re the only outpost of the League nearby I guess he’ll pay you a visit! Arrivederci, friends!

[Here the League campaign overhaul ends for now; Ascendancy campaign is used further on, stay tuned for the campaign is currently work in progress and it will be expanded in future updates]

msg1.choice_000: Something tells me we will meet again soon!
